history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell (2,B) facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. To reach the goal at (8,H), I need to go down first, then right. Therefore, I turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly below (row 03, column B) is safe floor (`.`). To reach the goal at row 08, column H, I plan to move straight down along column B to row 8, then turn right and move east. The first step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down. To reach the goal at row 08, column H, I need to move down along column B because it is safe, then later turn right and move across row 08. The cell directly in front (row 04, column B) is floor, so I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H. I need to move south along column B until I reach row 08, then turn right and move east to the goal. The next cell directly in front of me (row 05, column B) is a floor cell (`.`), so I can safely move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 5, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column B) is a floor cell (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. My plan is to move down along column B to row 8, then turn right and move east to the goal at column H, row 8. This initial move is safe and progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column B facing down. The cell directly in front (row7 col B) is a floor (`.`), so it is safe to move. After moving down to row7, I can continue down to row8, then turn right and move east along row8 to the goal at row8 col H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row7, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row8, column H. Directly ahead (down) is an empty cell at row8, column B. The lava cells are at columns C-H on row7 and at columns C and E on rows 2-6, but row8 is clear. So the safest path is to move forward to row8, then turn right and move east along row8 to the goal. Thus, the next action is MOVE_FORWARD.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H, directly to the right. The path along row 8 is clear of lava (all floor cells). To move right, I need to change my orientation from down to right. Turning left (counter-clockwise) from down will make me face right. So I will turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. The path ahead is clear (cells C through G are all floor). I can move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C facing right (>). The goal is at row 08 column H, directly to my right. All cells between are floor (.), so I can move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 8, column D, facing right (>). The goal is at row 8, column H, directly to the east with no obstacles in between. I can simply move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column E, facing right. The goal is at row 08, column H, three cells to the right. The cells in between (F and G) are empty floor cells, so it's safe to move forward. I will move forward one step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, two cells ahead. The cell directly in front (row 08 column G) is floor, so it is safe to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column G, facing right. The goal is directly in front at row 08, column H. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
